The '''''Ixiyen''-class fast attack craft''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] designed by [[TransGalMeg Industries, Incorporated]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="RECG" />

==Characteristics==
The ''Ixiyen'' was designed to be a dominant force in the average fighter-on-fighter confrontation. It was also armed and protected well enough to be able to harry much larger ships.

==History==
Although not used in large numbers by any governmental organizations, it was not for lack of quality or performance. The ''Ixiyen'' was a deadly opponent, capable of holding its own against most of its contemporaries in front-line combat craft.

The ''Ixiyen''{{'s}} focus on starfighter combat made it a fine choice for pilots expecting to meet resistance in flight. As a result, the ''Ixiyen'' was used quite extensively in the time of the Galactic Civil War by [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] and agents of [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]], as well other independent groups.

{{Ship-stub}}
